coreIssue: This growth conversation is likely about whether Maria still lacks a usable readout from the last promotion decision and what support she wants now as a Principal.
openingQuestion: What would be most useful to unpack from last cycle’s decision so you can choose where to invest your energy next as a Principal?
listenFor: whether she names a specific piece of feedback she did or did not receive from the last cycle
if they connect lower ritual participation to a concrete shift in trust, motivation, or sense of fit
whether she describes mentoring with clear Principal-level outcomes or as somewhere her energy naturally went after the decision
avoid: do not frame her lower team-ritual engagement as a commitment problem before you understand what changed
do not jump into defending the promotion decision instead of testing whether she wants a clearer readout and your help interpreting it
goodOutcome: You and Maria have agreed what Principal-level growth signal she wants clarified from the last cycle and one leadership-shaped area where she will invest next.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pull the exact promotion-cycle feedback Maria received and identify one concrete example of Principal-level scope or influence that was missing or already present.
